Title: Triathlon Swim Series - CSS TT Test #1 (150TT) - [WKT #24]
Description:
Warm Up 400 as:
- 200 Swim @50-70%
- 4×25 Kick – Take 5s
- 100 Pull @60-70%

Drill Set
8×25 3-2-3 Drill – Take 5-10s after each 25

Pre-Set - TT Prep (CSS Paced)
8×50 Build to Fast in :30 on :41
(Last 2-3 reps at 90% effort, hitting CSS pace)

2×300 as follows:

  - 150 Easy Recovery
  (Take 1 min rest after each 300)
4×50 @ CSS Pace in :30 on :41

Cool Down
4×25 3-2-3 Drill
100 Choice @ Easy

*TT = Time Trial (All-Out Maximal Effort)
*Record your time for CSS pace assessment
